<span class='generateShortDescriptionForMedAbstractOrder'>Paclitaxel IV</span> 90 mg (45 mg/m2; BSA: 1.94 m2 = 90 mg)<br/><hr/>Paclitaxel IV 6 mg/mL concentrate<br/><hr/>90 mg intravenously Piggyback once. <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Admin over:</span> 1 hours <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Admix fluid:</span> 0.9 % Sodium Chloride <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>Volume:</span> 250 mL <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'>to</span> 500 mL <span class='g2FormLabel'>Instructions:</span> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionInstructions'>Final product concentration must be 0.3-1.2 mg/mL. Administer using Non-DEHP-containing equipment and through an in-line 0.22 micron filter. Paclitaxel is a vascular irritant.</span><br/> <span class='patOrderDosePrescriptionLabel'></span>

dosageInstruction.text:
Final product concentration must be 0.3-1.2 mg/mL.
Administer using Non-DEHP-containing equipment and through an in-line 0.22 micron filter.
Paclitaxel is a vascular irritant.
